data.name: NTR Tavern
data.detailed_description:
NTR Tavern is an adult barmaid simulator where you work in the seedy tavern, taking orders and serving drinks to men who rarely keep their eyes—or hands—to themselves.

You’ve just arrived in town with your husband, ready to start over. But after falling into debt, you’re offered a job to work it off: one shift at a time. It’s a job you’d never accept under normal circumstances.

Pour pints, earn tips, and try not to draw too much attention... After all, you’re still a married woman trying to keep some dignity intact. But the debt won't pay itself, especially not with an unemployed, alcoholic husband.

So, give in a little, and the coin comes faster. Give in more, and the offers get filthier. Unlock new scenes as you stop resisting and start craving.

Just remember—rumors travel fast in a place like this. You can keep playing... as long as you can keep it a secret from him.

Features:

• Serve the customers and earn money across daily shifts

• Corruption-based progression with more unlockable scenes

• Resist or give in. Just remember, every relationship has secrets. 

• Multiple hours of gameplay, with added music and sound effects across all scenes. 

• Unlock prostitution as corruption deepens, and please your most loyal patrons. 

Contains explicit adult content. Player discretion is advised.

data.short_description: NTR Tavern is an adult barmaid simulator where you serve patrons, manage debt, and navigate temptation—balance integrity, desperation, and desire in a provocative drinking tavern setting.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL-compatible GPU with at least 1 GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 or newer
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL-compatible GPU with at least 1 GB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
